description: Essential vocabulary and phrases for dining out, from making a reservation to paying the bill.

keywords.definition: To ask for food or drink in a restaurant.

statements.text: I'd like to order the grilled chicken, please.

american_ga.ipa_transcription: /aɪd laɪk tə ˈɔːrdər ðə ɡrɪld ˈtʃɪkɪn pleɪz/

british_rp.ipa_transcription: /aɪd laɪk tə ˈɔːdə ðə ɡrɪld ˈtʃɪkɪn pliːz/

british_estuary.ipa_transcription: /aɪd laɪk tə ˈɔːdə ðə ɡrɪʊd ˈtʃɪkɪn pliːz/

statements.text: Can we order now? We've been waiting for a while.
statements.usage_note: Used to get the waiter's attention politely.

american_ga.ipa_transcription: /kæn wiː ˈɔːrdər naʊ wiːv bɪn ˈweɪtɪŋ fər ə waɪl/

british_rp.ipa_transcription: /kæn wiː ˈɔːdə naʊ wiːv bɪn ˈweɪtɪŋ fər ə waɪl/

british_estuary.ipa_transcription: /kæn wiː ˈɔːdə naʊ wiːv bɪn ˈweɪʔɪŋ fər ə waɪl/

statements.text: I'll have the same as her, please.

american_ga.ipa_transcription: /aɪl hæv ðə seɪm æz hɜːr pleɪz/

british_rp.ipa_transcription: /aɪl hæv ðə seɪm æz hɜː pliːz/

british_estuary.ipa_transcription: /aɪl æv ðə seɪm æz hɜː pliːz/

statements.text: Could I change my order? I'd prefer the pasta.

american_ga.ipa_transcription: /kʊd aɪ tʃeɪndʒ maɪ ˈɔːrdər aɪd prɪˈfɜːr ðə ˈpɑːstə/

british_rp.ipa_transcription: /kʊd aɪ tʃeɪndʒ maɪ ˈɔːdə aɪd prɪˈfɜː ðə ˈpæstə/

british_estuary.ipa_transcription: /kʊd aɪ tʃeɪndʒ maɪ ˈɔːdə aɪd prɪˈfɜː ðə ˈpæstə/

statements.text: We're ready to order, thank you.
statements.usage_note: Simple signal to the server that the table has decided.

keywords.definition: To book a table in advance at a restaurant.

statements.text: I'd like to reserve a table for four at seven o'clock.
statements.regional_variant_note: American alternative: 'I'd like to make a reservation for four at seven.'

american_ga.ipa_transcription: /aɪd laɪk tə rɪˈzɜːrv ə ˈteɪbl fər fɔːr æt ˈsɛvən əˈklɒk/

british_rp.ipa_transcription: /aɪd laɪk tə rɪˈzɜːv ə ˈteɪbl fə fɔː æt ˈsɛvən əˈklɒk/

british_estuary.ipa_transcription: /aɪd laɪk tə rɪˈzɜːv ə ˈteɪbl fə fɔː æʔ ˈsɛvən əˈklɒk/

statements.text: Do you have a reservation under the name Smith?
statements.usage_note: What to say when you arrive and check in.

american_ga.ipa_transcription: /duː juː hæv ə ˌrɛzərˈveɪʃən ˈʌndər ðə neɪm smɪθ/

british_rp.ipa_transcription: /duː juː hæv ə ˌrɛzəˈveɪʃən ˈʌndə ðə neɪm smɪθ/

british_estuary.ipa_transcription: /duː juː æv ə ˌrɛzəˈveɪʃən ˈʌndə ðə neɪm smɪθ/

statements.text: I'm afraid we don't take reservations — it's walk-in only.
statements.usage_note: What a restaurant might say back to you.

american_ga.ipa_transcription: /aɪm əˈfreɪd wiː doʊnt teɪk ˌrɛzərˈveɪʃənz ɪts wɔːk ɪn ˈoʊnli/

british_rp.ipa_transcription: /aɪm əˈfreɪd wiː dəʊnt teɪk ˌrɛzəˈveɪʃənz ɪts wɔːk ɪn ˈəʊnli/

british_estuary.ipa_transcription: /aɪm əˈfreɪd wiː dəʊnt teɪk ˌrɛzəˈveɪʃənz ɪts wɔːk ɪn ˈəʊnli/

statements.text: I'd like to cancel my reservation, please.
statements.usage_note: Cancelling in advance is considered polite.

american_ga.ipa_transcription: /aɪd laɪk tə ˈkænsəl maɪ ˌrɛzərˈveɪʃən pleɪz/

british_rp.ipa_transcription: /aɪd laɪk tə ˈkænsəl maɪ ˌrɛzəˈveɪʃən pliːz/

british_estuary.ipa_transcription: /aɪd laɪk tə ˈkænsəl maɪ ˌrɛzəˈveɪʃən pliːz/

keywords.definition: To suggest something as being good or suitable.

statements.text: What do you recommend from the menu?

american_ga.ipa_transcription: /wʌt duː juː ˌrɛkəˈmɛnd frəm ðə ˈmɛnjuː/

british_rp.ipa_transcription: /wɒt duː juː ˌrɛkəˈmɛnd frəm ðə ˈmɛnjuː/

british_estuary.ipa_transcription: /wɒʔ duː juː ˌrɛkəˈmɛnd frəm ðə ˈmɛnjuː/

statements.text: I'd highly recommend the fish — it's the chef's special today.

american_ga.ipa_transcription: /aɪd ˈhaɪli ˌrɛkəˈmɛnd ðə fɪʃ ɪts ðə ʃɛfs ˈspɛʃəl təˈdeɪ/

british_rp.ipa_transcription: /aɪd ˈhaɪli ˌrɛkəˈmɛnd ðə fɪʃ ɪts ðə ʃɛfs ˈspɛʃəl təˈdeɪ/

british_estuary.ipa_transcription: /aɪd ˈhaɪli ˌrɛkəˈmɛnd ðə fɪʃ ɪʔs ðə ʃɛfs ˈspɛʃəl təˈdeɪ/

statements.text: Can you recommend something without nuts? I have an allergy.

american_ga.ipa_transcription: /kæn juː ˌrɛkəˈmɛnd ˈsʌmθɪŋ wɪˈðaʊt nʌts aɪ hæv æn ˈælərdʒi/

british_rp.ipa_transcription: /kæn juː ˌrɛkəˈmɛnd ˈsʌmθɪŋ wɪˈðaʊt nʌts aɪ hæv ən ˈælərdʒi/

british_estuary.ipa_transcription: /kæn juː ˌrɛkəˈmɛnd ˈsʌmfɪŋ wɪˈðaʊt nʌts aɪ æv ən ˈælərdʒi/

statements.text: This place comes highly recommended — the pasta is excellent.

american_ga.ipa_transcription: /ðɪs pleɪs kʌmz ˈhaɪli ˌrɛkəˈmɛndɪd ðə ˈpɑːstə ɪz ˈɛksələnt/

british_rp.ipa_transcription: /ðɪs pleɪs kʌmz ˈhaɪli ˌrɛkəˈmɛndɪd ðə ˈpæstə ɪz ˈɛksələnt/

british_estuary.ipa_transcription: /ðɪs pleɪs kʌmz ˈhaɪli ˌrɛkəˈmɛndɪd ðə ˈpæstə ɪz ˈɛksələnt/

keywords.definition: The written statement of how much you owe for your meal.

statements.text: Could we have the bill, please?
statements.usage_note: Standard British request for the check.
statements.regional_variant_note: US version: 'Could we have the check, please?'

statements.text: Can we split the bill? We'd like to pay separately.
statements.usage_note: 'Split the bill' means each person pays their share.

american_ga.ipa_transcription: /kæn wiː splɪt ðə tʃɛk wiːd laɪk tə peɪ ˈsɛprətli/

british_rp.ipa_transcription: /kæn wiː splɪt ðə bɪl wiːd laɪk tə peɪ ˈsɛprətli/

british_estuary.ipa_transcription: /kæn wiː splɪt ðə bɪl wiːd laɪk tə peɪ ˈsɛprətli/

statements.text: I think there's a mistake on the bill — I didn't order the soup.
statements.usage_note: How to politely dispute a charge.

american_ga.ipa_transcription: /aɪ θɪŋk ðɛrz ə mɪˈsteɪk ɒn ðə tʃɛk aɪ ˈdɪdnt ˈɔːrdər ðə suːp/

british_rp.ipa_transcription: /aɪ θɪŋk ðɛəz ə mɪˈsteɪk ɒn ðə bɪl aɪ ˈdɪdnt ˈɔːdə ðə suːp/

british_estuary.ipa_transcription: /aɪ fɪŋk ðɛəz ə mɪˈsteɪk ɒn ðə bɪl aɪ ˈdɪdnt ˈɔːdə ðə suːp/

keywords.definition: Having a medical reaction to a particular food or substance.

statements.text: I'm allergic to shellfish — is there any in this dish?

american_ga.ipa_transcription: /aɪm əˈlɜːrdʒɪk tə ˈʃɛlfɪʃ ɪz ðɛr ˈɛni ɪn ðɪs dɪʃ/

british_rp.ipa_transcription: /aɪm əˈlɜːdʒɪk tə ˈʃɛlfɪʃ ɪz ðɛə ˈɛni ɪn ðɪs dɪʃ/

british_estuary.ipa_transcription: /aɪm əˈlɜːdʒɪk tə ˈʃɛlfɪʃ ɪz ðɛə ˈɛni ɪn ðɪs dɪʃ/

statements.text: Please let the kitchen know — I have a severe nut allergy.

american_ga.ipa_transcription: /pliːz lɛt ðə ˈkɪtʃɪn noʊ aɪ hæv ə sɪˈvɪər nʌt ˈælərdʒi/

british_rp.ipa_transcription: /pliːz lɛt ðə ˈkɪtʃɪn nəʊ aɪ hæv ə sɪˈvɪə nʌt ˈælərdʒi/

british_estuary.ipa_transcription: /pliːz lɛt ðə ˈkɪtʃɪn nəʊ aɪ æv ə sɪˈvɪə nʌt ˈælərdʒi/
